evidenceSnippet: Spotify page shows 2,348,449 followers and 6,079,033 monthly listeners. Bio mentions '35 years of block rockin beats' and Tom Rowlands.
notes: Electronic duo (Tom Rowlands & Ed Simons). Official artist page verified by discography including 'Dig Your Own Hole', 'Surrender', etc.

evidenceSnippet: Songstats shows 4,732 followers, 280K streams. Spotify page shows ~431 monthly listeners.
notes: Swiss-American visual artist and composer. Pioneer of turntablism/sound art. Identity verified by bio and discography (Records 1981-1989, More Encores, etc.)

evidenceSnippet: Spotify page shows 537 monthly listeners. Both Songstats and MusicMetricsVault show no tracking data, indicating follower count is below their tracking thresholds.
notes: German sound artist/composer (b. 1948). Has Spotify releases (TUNING, Night Flights, Invisible Inaudible, Magnetic Flights). Follower count too small to be tracked by analytics platforms.

evidenceSnippet: No Spotify artist page with music releases found. Christine Sun Kim is a Berlin-based deaf/sound artist who works in visual art, performance, and installation. Her work uses musical notation as visual art rather than audio compositions.
notes: Deaf sound artist working primarily in visual arts (drawing, performance, installation, video). Not distributed as music on Spotify. A different 'Christine Kim' on Spotify (classical musician, 3 followers) is not the same person.

evidenceSnippet: Songstats shows 1.52M followers, 5.81B streams. Spotify page shows 16,729,776 monthly listeners. Bio confirms Eurythmics co-founder with 100M+ albums sold.
notes: Eurythmics co-founder (with Annie Lennox). Solo artist page verified by bio mentioning 100M+ albums sold and extensive production credits (Mick Jagger, Tom Petty, Stevie Nicks, Bob Dylan).

evidenceSnippet: Spotify page shows 37 followers, 63 monthly listeners. Solo releases include 'Intervals' (2012) and 'Home to Stay' (2019).
notes: Ambient/electronic producer. Also in State River Widening and Ellis Island Sound. Associated Snow Palms project (with Christopher Leary) has 1,826 followers. Low count reflects niche/experimental genre.

evidenceSnippet: Spotify page shows 6,347 followers and 30,106 monthly listeners. Bio describes her as 'the Electronician' French electronic artist.
notes: French electronic artist. Verified by bio mentioning synesthesia-inspired album 'Musicalism' and collaborations with Jay-Jay Johanson, Isabelle Adjani, Oxia.

evidenceSnippet: Spotify page shows 13,716,140 followers and 49,234,716 monthly listeners. Chartmetric confirms 13.7M followers. 43 billion total streams worldwide.
notes: UK pop singer-songwriter. Verified by extensive discography (Lights, Halcyon, Delirium, Brightest Blue). One of the most streamed female artists on Spotify.

evidenceSnippet: Songstats shows 7.79M followers, 5.45B streams. Spotify shows ~16.4M monthly listeners. Verified by hits 'Sweet Dreams', 'Here Comes the Rain Again'.
notes: British synth-pop duo (Annie Lennox & Dave Stewart). Verified by iconic hits 'Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)', 'Here Comes the Rain Again', etc.
